case_title: TERESA VOTRUBA et al VS. BARRY A ROSE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOTRUBA, TERESA VOTRUBA, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSE, BARRY A $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,665.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL GET CREDIT FOR $2500 "HOLDING DEPOSIT". STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, BARRY A
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ROSE, BARRY A AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT VOTRUBA, TERESA VOTRUBA, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT VOTRUBA, JOHN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VOTRUBA, TERESA VOTRUBA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, BARRY A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSE, BARRY A AS TO PLAINTIFF VOTRUBA, TERESA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT KANE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL - FEE FOR SERVICE - $45.00 , FEE FOR SERVICE BY MAIL $45.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOTRUBA, TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, BARRY A

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ROSE, BARRY A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT VOTRUBA, TERESA VOTRUBA, JOHN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSE, BARRY A AS TO PLAINTIFF VOTRUBA, JOHN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT KANE FILED BY VOTRUBA, TERESA VOTRUBA, JOHN ROSE, BARRY A

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT KANE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
